'''Beta Rhama''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Dalchon sector/Legends|Dalchon sector]], on the same [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperroute]] as [[Nimba Five]].

{{Planet-stub}}
